accepted.reason: The current official Python 3.12.13 slim-bookworm image has no fixed Debian package. The issue is a local out-of-bounds read in Perl Socket.pack_ip_mreq_source; this application never invokes Perl or that API.
controls: No application code invokes perl or Perl Socket
Runtime is non-root, capability-free, no-new-privileges and read-only
API has no command execution endpoint
Review the official Python image and Docker Scout weekly; remove the exception when fixed

accepted.reason: The current official image has no fixed Debian package. Exploitation requires processing attacker ZIP data through Perl IO::Uncompress::Unzip; uploads are handled by bounded Python parsers and Perl is never invoked.
controls: No application code invokes perl or Perl IO::Uncompress
Upload parsers run with file, expansion and time limits
Runtime is non-root, capability-free, no-new-privileges and read-only
Review the official Python image and Docker Scout weekly; remove the exception when fixed

accepted.reason: The current official image has no fixed Debian package. Exploitation requires an attacker-controlled output glob passed to Perl File::GlobMapper; the application never invokes Perl or that module.
controls: No application code invokes perl or Perl File::GlobMapper
Runtime is non-root, capability-free, no-new-privileges and read-only
API has no command execution endpoint
Review the official Python image and Docker Scout weekly; remove the exception when fixed
